metadata.title: Time Ruler
metadata.description: A drag-and-drop time ruler combining the best of a task list and a calendar view (integrates with Tasks, Full Calendar, and Dataview).

regex.source:
Notice(
          "Time Ruler: Error in custom search filter function (check console)
regex.target:
